name: Empty State
description: No-data placeholder with optional action button for empty lists and tables.

icon.description: Heroicon name for the empty state illustration

default.description: Optional custom content below the description

decision_rule: Use when a list, table, or section has no data. Always include heading and description. Include action button when user can create the missing item.

filament_equivalent.note: In Filament tables, use $table->emptyStateActions() and emptyStateHeading()
